title: Bullet Scars
writer: Robert E. Kent, Charles Belden, Sy Bartlett
actors: Regis Toomey, Adele Longmire, Howard Da Silva
plot: Gangster Frank Dillon abducts Dr. Steven Bishop to treat wounded Joe Madison. Dillon also takes Joe's nurse sister. Dillon threatens Bishop's life if Joe dies, but Bishop knows Dillon will kill him anyway.
